import io
import string
import list

fn flush(_ tokens: List<Int>, _ buf: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(buf)
    tokens
  else
    match string.parse_int(buf)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(tokens, v)
    when None
      tokens
    end
  end
end

fn parse_tokens(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        tokens = flush(tokens, current)
        current = ""
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  flush(tokens, current)
end

fn build_output(_ tokens: List<Int>) -> String
  mut sum = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let len = tokens.len()
  while j < len
    match tokens.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      sum = sum + v
      if j == 0
        out = "#{sum}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{sum}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = parse_tokens(line)
    let out = build_output(tokens)
    println(out)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
